intro: Save your space base by shooting down the enemies!
description:
Evil bosses and minions and stuff have taken over your space base!

Gear up and shoot down the enemies that have invaded each zone in this side-scrolling shooter and platformer. There's a boss at the end of each zone (because it's a video game) that will require the best of your abilities to defeat! Use everything at your disposal: your primary weapon, shields, a special attack, and more!

As the lone warrior tasked with this mission, can you save this space station from total destruction?

Features:
* 59 levels across 6 zones!
* 6 dangerous bosses to defeat!
* Arena Mode: defeat a set number of enemies before it's game over!
* Upgrade your character with 12 special attacks and 6 unique enhancements!
* Choose between 10 different character designs!
* Retro-inspired graphics and music!
